title: 50PCS Gold Star Bamboo Cocktail Picks, 5.5 Inch Christmas Fancy Toothpicks for Appetizers, Long Decorative Cocktail Picks for Party Decoration, Appetizer Skewers for Charcuterie Sandwich Burgers Fruit
features: 【Toothpicks for Appetizers】50pcs gold star decorative toothpicks per bag, easy to decorate and use, use these appetizer toothpicks to make your charcuterie or appetizers and cocktail presentation stand out, these bamboo sticks make your party more attractive and will surely amaze your friends!

【Creative Decorative Design】These Cocktail Picks are designed with hollow stars on the top. The gold appetizer skewers will sparkle slightly, which is cute, charming, novel, and interesting. It will bring unique decoration to cocktails and food, perfect for daily life and various catering events, party cocktail parties and other theme parties, social gatherings, celebrations, birthdays, etc.

【Sturdy & Durable】Cocktail picks made of high quality bamboo, smooth surface without burrs, lenth is 5.5 inch, can easily pierce the food to hold the ingredients together without breaking. Fancy toothpicks are a great decoration for charcuterie boards, appetizers, fruit kabobs, olives, desserts, ice cream, sandwiches, hamburgers, salads, buffets, drinks, and vegetables.

【Convenient and Sanitary】These versatile cocktail picks can be used as party frills, finger food picks, bento food picks, or buffet food picks. As disposable items, they save you time on cleaning up after events or parties, making them a practical choice for both home and restaurant use.

【Versatile Applications】These eye-catching cocktail picks are not only functional but also serve as stylish decorations. Perfect for antipasto, fruits, kabobs, veggies, canapes, desserts, sandwiches, cheeses, sausages, meatballs, and more. Ideal for various occasions such as cocktail parties, winter gatherings, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas, weddings, birthdays, and anniversaries.
description: Features: Whether you're decorating cupcakes, muffins, desserts, cookies, donuts, or appetizers, these star toppers will make your food look delicious and your guests feel the warmth of your home party. These glitter star picks are designed to be disposable and are lightweight and easy to carry, making them a perfect choice for families and parties. It can be discarded directly after use, saving time on cleanup and allowing you to enjoy the party easily. These appetizer skewers are great for appetizers such as cheese, kebabs, olives and fruits, and are also great for sausages, cakes, sandwiches, jerky and cocktail skewers, making the food more attractive and enhancing the enjoyable party experience, is a very practical fruit decoration tool. Product Information: Product Name: Gold Star Decorative Toothpick Color: Gold Material: Bamboo Size: Length 14cm / 5.5in Net Weight per Set: 44.5g/0.1 Lb; Gross Weight per Set: 44.5g/0.1 Lb; Packing Method: Bag Packing Packing Size: 16.5×15×3cm Packing List: 50PCS Star Toothpick Sticks Note： 1. Please allow slight differences due to manual measurement. 2. Due to light and screen difference, the item color may be slightly different from the pictures. Please understand.
